name: supy-wingspan
description: AI-assisted engineering standards for Supy repos: stack-aware review agents (NestJS backend + Angular frontend + Flutter mobile + standalone Firebase Functions backend + standalone commander.js CLI + polyglot AI-agents monorepo + Kubernetes config), a stack-agnostic secrets reviewer that blocks committed credentials, scaffolding, Git, spec-authoring, CI-fixing and Flutter delivery skills (Figma-to-code, release readiness, SDK upgrades, code assessment), a consistency baseline generator, and orchestration wrappers over superpowers. Each repo only surfaces skills for its detected stack.
